'''zhamushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yodel|yodel]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yodel|yodel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhamushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæmishith|zhæmishith]] || [[word:zhæmishij|zhæmishij]] || [[word:zhæmishish|zhæmishish]] || [[word:zhæmishi|zhæmishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamumushuth|zhamumushuth]] || [[word:zhamumushuj|zhamumushuj]] || [[word:zhamumushush|zhamumushush]] || [[word:zhamumushu|zhamumushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamushuth|zhamushuth]] || [[word:zhamushuj|zhamushuj]] || [[word:zhamushush|zhamushush]] || [[word:zhamushu|zhamushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamufshuth|zhamufshuth]] || [[word:zhamufshuj|zhamufshuj]] || [[word:zhamufshush|zhamufshush]] || [[word:zhamufshuf|zhamufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhamushuthu|zhamushuthu]] || [[word:zhamushuju|zhamushuju]] || [[word:zhamushushu|zhamushushu]] || [[word:zhamushuku|zhamushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhamushuth|zhamushuth]] || [[word:zhamushuj|zhamushuj]] || [[word:zhamushush|zhamushush]] || [[word:zhamushu|zhamushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhamushuthul|zhamushuthul]] || [[word:zhamushujul|zhamushujul]] || [[word:zhamushushul|zhamushushul]] || [[word:zhamushukul|zhamushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhamushuthuthu|zhamushuthuthu]] || [[word:zhamushujuju|zhamushujuju]] || [[word:zhamushushushu|zhamushushushu]] || [[word:zhamushuku|zhamushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhamushuthun|zhamushuthun]] || [[word:zhamushujun|zhamushujun]] || [[word:zhamushushun|zhamushushun]] || [[word:zhamushukun|zhamushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhamushuthuoro|zhamushuthuoro]] || [[word:zhamushujuoro|zhamushujuoro]] || [[word:zhamushushuoro|zhamushushuoro]] || [[word:zhamushukuoro|zhamushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
